title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Domino's India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Domino's India
jsonLd.description:
Domino's India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Hyderabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Domino's India:
Domino's India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Domino's India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
